# Stonehaven Lending

> Stonehaven Lending is a bilingual (English/Spanish) U.S. real estate
> brokerage and capital advisory firm. It arranges commercial real estate,
> SBA 7(a)/504, and DSCR rental-property financing through third-party
> capital providers nationwide; program availability varies by state.
> Stonehaven is not a direct lender - the selected lender makes the credit
> decision. Preliminary deal reviews are educational and are not approvals,
> commitments, rate quotes or guarantees.

Key facts:
- Role: capital advisory + brokerage; financing arranged through third-party lenders
- Residential DSCR convention modeled: eligible monthly rent ÷ monthly PITIA (1-4 units); commercial DSCR commonly uses NOI ÷ annual debt service
- Calculators are deterministic, unit-tested code - methodology published at /calculation-methodology
- DSCR financing is business-purpose, investment-property only (never owner-occupied homes)
- Contact: office@stonehavencre.com - preliminary response within one business day
- Equal Housing Opportunity

## Core pages
- [DSCR Loans for Rental Property](https://stonehavencre.com/dscr): pillar guide - definition, lender DSCR vs investor cash flow, scenarios, requirements, risks, 22 FAQs
- [DSCR Loan Calculator](https://stonehavencre.com/dscr-analyzer): immediate ungated calculator - PITIA, DSCR, rent-needed and sizing at a target ratio
- [DSCR Deal Review](https://stonehavencre.com/dscr-review): two-view analysis (lender formula vs investor economics), prepayment explainer, preliminary review request
- [Commercial Real Estate Financing](https://stonehavencre.com/commercial): acquisition, refinance, rescue and disposition routing for income-producing property
- [SBA Financing](https://stonehavencre.com/sba): SBA 7(a) and 504 for owner-occupied real estate and business acquisition, via participating lenders
- [Calculation Methodology](https://stonehavencre.com/calculation-methodology): the exact formulas and conventions behind every figure on this site
- [Contact](https://stonehavencre.com/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://stonehavencre.com/privacy)
